用户输入与会话

状态已完成
难度中等
预计阅读35 分钟
源文件markdown/02-session-message.md

Agent 生成档案

Section titled “Agent 生成档案”
  • 章节 ID：02-session-message
  • 章节摘要：理解 CLI/API 输入如何变成 session、message 和 part，并被后续 agent loop 消费。
  • 章节元数据：/data/chapters.json
  • 源码映射：/data/source-map.json

主要源码路径

Section titled “主要源码路径”
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts

对应模块：study-output/02-opencode-function-outline.md 的 “2.2 用户输入与会话”。
主要源码：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts、handlers/session.ts、packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts、session.ts、message-v2.ts。

0. 本章学习目标

Section titled “0. 本章学习目标”

你会学到：session API 的 payload 如何定义，HTTP handler 如何调用 SessionPrompt，createUserMessage 如何选择 agent/model 并解析 parts，MessageV2 如何建模 user/assistant/tool/text/file，用户输入如何被持久化为后续 agent loop 的上下文。

1. 一句话讲明白

Section titled “1. 一句话讲明白”

用户输入与会话模块负责把外部请求变成稳定的内部事实：一个 session 下的 user message 和一组 message parts。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731、packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1230。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731 
689    const createUserMessage = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.createUserMessage")(function* (input: PromptInput) {690      const agentName = input.agent691      const ag = agentName ? yield* agents.get(agentName) : yield* agents.defaultInfo()692      if (!ag) {693        const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)694        const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""695        const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${agentName}".${hint}` })696        yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID: input.sessionID, error: error.toObject() })697        throw error698      }699700      const current = Database.use((db) =>701        db702          .select({ agent: SessionTable.agent, model: SessionTable.model })703          .from(SessionTable)704          .where(eq(SessionTable.id, input.sessionID))705          .get(),706      )707      const model = input.model ?? ag.model ?? (yield* currentModel(input.sessionID))708      const same = ag.model && model.providerID === ag.model.providerID && model.modelID === ag.model.modelID709      const full =710        !input.variant && ag.variant && same711          ? yield* provider712              .getModel(model.providerID, model.modelID)713              .pipe(Effect.catchIf(Provider.ModelNotFoundError.isInstance, () => Effect.succeed(undefined)))714          : undefined715      const variant = input.variant ?? (ag.variant && full?.variants?.[ag.variant] ? ag.variant : undefined)716717      const info: MessageV2.User = {718        id: input.messageID ?? MessageID.ascending(),719        role: "user",720        sessionID: input.sessionID,721        time: { created: Date.now() },722        tools: input.tools,723        agent: ag.name,724        model: {725          providerID: model.providerID,726          modelID: model.modelID,727          variant,728        },729        system: input.system,730        format: input.format,731      }
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1230 
1116      yield* sessions.updateMessage(info)1117      for (const part of parts) yield* sessions.updatePart(part)1118      const nextPrompt = parts.reduce(1119        (result, part) => {1120          if (part.type === "text") {1121            if (part.synthetic) result.synthetic.push(part.text)1122            else result.text.push(part.text)1123            const reference = referencePromptMetadata(part.metadata?.reference)1124            if (reference) {1125              result.references.push(1126                new ReferenceAttachment({1127                  name: reference.name,1128                  kind: reference.kind,1129                  uri: reference.path ? pathToFileURL(reference.path).href : undefined,1130                  repository: reference.repository,1131                  branch: reference.branch,1132                  target: reference.target,1133                  targetUri: reference.targetPath ? pathToFileURL(reference.targetPath).href : undefined,1134                  problem: reference.problem,1135                  source: new Source({1136                    start: reference.source.start,1137                    end: reference.source.end,1138                    text: reference.source.value,1139                  }),1140                }),1141              )1142            }1143          }1144          if (part.type === "file") {1145            result.files.push(1146              new FileAttachment({1147                uri: part.url,1148                mime: part.mime,1149                name: part.filename,1150                source: part.source1151                  ? new Source({1152                      start: part.source.text.start,1153                      end: part.source.text.end,1154                      text: part.source.text.value,1155                    })1156                  : undefined,1157              }),1158            )1159          }1160          if (part.type === "agent") {1161            result.agents.push(1162              new AgentAttachment({1163                name: part.name,1164                source: part.source1165                  ? new Source({1166                      start: part.source.start,1167                      end: part.source.end,1168                      text: part.source.value,1169                    })1170                  : undefined,1171              }),1172            )1173          }1174          return result1175        },1176        {1177          text: [] as string[],1178          files: [] as FileAttachment[],1179          agents: [] as AgentAttachment[],1180          references: [] as ReferenceAttachment[],1181          synthetic: [] as string[],1182        },1183      )1184      // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1185      if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1186        yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Prompted, {1187          sessionID: input.sessionID,1188          timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1189          prompt: {1190            text: nextPrompt.text.join("\n"),1191            files: nextPrompt.files,1192            agents: nextPrompt.agents,1193            references: nextPrompt.references,1194          },1195        })1196      }1197      for (const text of nextPrompt.synthetic) {1198        // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1199        if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1200          yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Synthetic, {1201            sessionID: input.sessionID,1202            timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1203            text,1204          })1205        }1206      }12071208      return { info, parts }1209    }, Effect.scoped)12101211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })

2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置

Section titled “2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置”

CLI/API 只提供输入，agent loop 只消费消息历史。中间的桥就是 session/message 层：它把文本、文件、agent mention、MCP resource、权限覆盖、模型选择等都整理成统一结构。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66-68、packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:327-380。

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66-68 
66export const PromptPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.PromptInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))67export const CommandPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.CommandInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))68export const ShellPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.ShellInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))
packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:327-380 
327export const User = Schema.Struct({328  ...messageBase,329  role: Schema.Literal("user"),330  time: Schema.Struct({331    created: NonNegativeInt,332  }),333  format: Schema.optional(Format),334  summary: Schema.optional(335    Schema.Struct({336      title: Schema.optional(Schema.String),337      body: Schema.optional(Schema.String),338      diffs: Schema.Array(Snapshot.FileDiff),339    }),340  ),341  agent: Schema.String,342  model: Schema.Struct({343    providerID: ProviderID,344    modelID: ModelID,345    variant: Schema.optional(Schema.String),346  }),347  system: Schema.optional(Schema.String),348  tools: Schema.optional(Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Boolean)),349}).annotate({ identifier: "UserMessage" })350export type User = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof User>>351352export const Part = Schema.Union([353  TextPart,354  SubtaskPart,355  ReasoningPart,356  FilePart,357  ToolPart,358  StepStartPart,359  StepFinishPart,360  SnapshotPart,361  PatchPart,362  AgentPart,363  RetryPart,364  CompactionPart,365]).annotate({ discriminator: "type", identifier: "Part" })366export type Part =367  | TextPart368  | SubtaskPart369  | ReasoningPart370  | FilePart371  | ToolPart372  | StepStartPart373  | StepFinishPart374  | SnapshotPart375  | PatchPart376  | AgentPart377  | RetryPart378  | CompactionPart379380const AssistantErrorSchema = Schema.Union([

3. 生活类比

Section titled “3. 生活类比”

把 session 看成一份项目档案，message 是档案里的每次沟通记录，part 是沟通记录里的附件、正文、工具结果或系统补充。agent 每轮工作前都先读档案，而不是只听最后一句话。

4. Java 开发者类比

Section titled “4. Java 开发者类比”
  • Session.Info 类似会话 aggregate。
  • MessageV2.User / Assistant 类似消息实体。
  • Part 是 message 的子实体集合，像 List<MessagePart>。
  • SessionPrompt.prompt 是 Application Service。
  • groups/session.ts 是 Controller 的 request/response schema。

5. 最小源码路径

Section titled “5. 最小源码路径”
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66-68：用 Struct.omit 从 SessionPrompt 输入类型派生 API payload。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66-68 
66export const PromptPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.PromptInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))67export const CommandPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.CommandInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))68export const ShellPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.ShellInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324：定义 session.prompt endpoint。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324 
312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts:279-290：handler 调用 promptSvc.prompt。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts:279-290 
279    const prompt = Effect.fn("SessionHttpApi.prompt")(function* (ctx: {280      params: { sessionID: SessionID }281      payload: typeof PromptPayload.Type282    }) {283      yield* requireSession(ctx.params.sessionID)284      const message = yield* promptSvc285        .prompt({286          ...ctx.payload,287          sessionID: ctx.params.sessionID,288        })289        .pipe(Effect.mapError(() => new HttpApiError.BadRequest({})))290      return HttpServerResponse.stream(Stream.make(JSON.stringify(message)).pipe(Stream.encodeText), {
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731：创建 user message info。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731 
689    const createUserMessage = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.createUserMessage")(function* (input: PromptInput) {690      const agentName = input.agent691      const ag = agentName ? yield* agents.get(agentName) : yield* agents.defaultInfo()692      if (!ag) {693        const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)694        const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""695        const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${agentName}".${hint}` })696        yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID: input.sessionID, error: error.toObject() })697        throw error698      }699700      const current = Database.use((db) =>701        db702          .select({ agent: SessionTable.agent, model: SessionTable.model })703          .from(SessionTable)704          .where(eq(SessionTable.id, input.sessionID))705          .get(),706      )707      const model = input.model ?? ag.model ?? (yield* currentModel(input.sessionID))708      const same = ag.model && model.providerID === ag.model.providerID && model.modelID === ag.model.modelID709      const full =710        !input.variant && ag.variant && same711          ? yield* provider712              .getModel(model.providerID, model.modelID)713              .pipe(Effect.catchIf(Provider.ModelNotFoundError.isInstance, () => Effect.succeed(undefined)))714          : undefined715      const variant = input.variant ?? (ag.variant && full?.variants?.[ag.variant] ? ag.variant : undefined)716717      const info: MessageV2.User = {718        id: input.messageID ?? MessageID.ascending(),719        role: "user",720        sessionID: input.sessionID,721        time: { created: Date.now() },722        tools: input.tools,723        agent: ag.name,724        model: {725          providerID: model.providerID,726          modelID: model.modelID,727          variant,728        },729        system: input.system,730        format: input.format,731      }
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:788-1085：解析 file/resource/agent parts。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:788-1085 
788      const resolvePart: (part: PromptInput["parts"][number]) => Effect.Effect<Draft<MessageV2.Part>[]> = Effect.fn(789        "SessionPrompt.resolveUserPart",790      )(function* (part) {791        if (part.type === "file") {792          if (part.source?.type === "resource") {793            const { clientName, uri } = part.source794            log.info("mcp resource", { clientName, uri, mime: part.mime })795            const pieces: Draft<MessageV2.Part>[] = [796              {797                messageID: info.id,798                sessionID: input.sessionID,799                type: "text",800                synthetic: true,801                text: `Reading MCP resource: ${part.filename} (${uri})`,802              },803            ]804            const exit = yield* mcp.readResource(clientName, uri).pipe(Effect.exit)805            if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {806              const content = exit.value807              if (!content) throw new Error(`Resource not found: ${clientName}/${uri}`)808              const items = Array.isArray(content.contents) ? content.contents : [content.contents]809              for (const c of items) {810                if ("text" in c && c.text) {811                  pieces.push({812                    messageID: info.id,813                    sessionID: input.sessionID,814                    type: "text",815                    synthetic: true,816                    text: c.text,817                  })818                } else if ("blob" in c && c.blob) {819                  const mime = "mimeType" in c ? c.mimeType : part.mime820                  pieces.push({821                    messageID: info.id,822                    sessionID: input.sessionID,823                    type: "text",824                    synthetic: true,825                    text: `[Binary content: ${mime}]`,826                  })827                }828              }829              pieces.push({ ...part, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID })830            } else {831              const error = Cause.squash(exit.cause)832              log.error("failed to read MCP resource", { error, clientName, uri })833              const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)834              pieces.push({835                messageID: info.id,836                sessionID: input.sessionID,837                type: "text",838                synthetic: true,839                text: `Failed to read MCP resource ${part.filename}: ${message}`,840              })841            }842            return pieces843          }844          const url = new URL(part.url)845          switch (url.protocol) {846            case "data:":847              if (part.mime === "text/plain") {848                return [849                  {850                    messageID: info.id,851                    sessionID: input.sessionID,852                    type: "text",853                    synthetic: true,854                    text: `Called the Read tool with the following input: ${JSON.stringify({ filePath: part.filename })}`,855                  },856                  {857                    messageID: info.id,858                    sessionID: input.sessionID,859                    type: "text",860                    synthetic: true,861                    text: decodeDataUrl(part.url),862                  },863                  { ...part, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID },864                ]865              }866              break867            case "file:": {868              log.info("file", { mime: part.mime })869              const filepath = fileURLToPath(part.url)870              const referenceContext = yield* referenceContextFromFilePart(part, filepath)871              const mime = (yield* fsys.isDir(filepath)) ? "application/x-directory" : part.mime872873              const { read } = yield* registry.named()874              const execRead = (args: Parameters<typeof read.execute>[0], extra?: Tool.Context["extra"]) => {875                const controller = new AbortController()876                return read877                  .execute(args, {878                    sessionID: input.sessionID,879                    abort: controller.signal,880                    agent: input.agent!,881                    messageID: info.id,882                    extra: { bypassCwdCheck: true, ...extra },883                    messages: [],884                    metadata: () => Effect.void,885                    ask: () => Effect.void,886                  })887                  .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => Effect.sync(() => controller.abort())))888              }889890              if (mime === "text/plain") {891                let offset: number | undefined892                let limit: number | undefined893                const range = { start: url.searchParams.get("start"), end: url.searchParams.get("end") }894                if (range.start != null) {895                  const filePathURI = part.url.split("?")[0]896                  let start = parseInt(range.start)897                  let end = range.end ? parseInt(range.end) : undefined898                  if (start === end) {899                    const symbols = yield* lsp.documentSymbol(filePathURI).pipe(Effect.catch(() => Effect.succeed([])))900                    for (const symbol of symbols) {901                      let r: LSP.Range | undefined902                      if ("range" in symbol) r = symbol.range903                      else if ("location" in symbol) r = symbol.location.range904                      if (r?.start?.line && r?.start?.line === start) {905                        start = r.start.line906                        end = r?.end?.line ?? start907                        break908                      }909                    }910                  }911                  offset = Math.max(start, 1)912                  if (end) limit = end - (offset - 1)913                }914                const args = { filePath: filepath, offset, limit }915                const pieces: Draft<MessageV2.Part>[] = [916                  ...(referenceContext917                    ? [{ ...referenceContext, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID }]918                    : []),919                  {920                    messageID: info.id,921                    sessionID: input.sessionID,922                    type: "text",923                    synthetic: true,924                    text: `Called the Read tool with the following input: ${JSON.stringify(args)}`,925                  },926                ]927                const exit = yield* provider.getModel(info.model.providerID, info.model.modelID).pipe(928                  Effect.flatMap((mdl) => execRead(args, { model: mdl })),929                  Effect.exit,930                )931                if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {932                  const result = exit.value933                  pieces.push({934                    messageID: info.id,935                    sessionID: input.sessionID,936                    type: "text",937                    synthetic: true,938                    text: result.output,939                  })940                  if (result.attachments?.length) {941                    pieces.push(942                      ...result.attachments.map((a) => ({943                        ...a,944                        synthetic: true,945                        filename: a.filename ?? part.filename,946                        messageID: info.id,947                        sessionID: input.sessionID,948                      })),949                    )950                  } else {951                    pieces.push({ ...part, mime, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID })952                  }953                } else {954                  const error = Cause.squash(exit.cause)955                  log.error("failed to read file", { error })956                  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)957                  yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, {958                    sessionID: input.sessionID,959                    error: new NamedError.Unknown({ message }).toObject(),960                  })961                  pieces.push({962                    messageID: info.id,963                    sessionID: input.sessionID,964                    type: "text",965                    synthetic: true,966                    text: `Read tool failed to read ${filepath} with the following error: ${message}`,967                  })968                }969                return pieces970              }971972              if (mime === "application/x-directory") {973                const args = { filePath: filepath }974                const exit = yield* execRead(args).pipe(Effect.exit)975                if (Exit.isFailure(exit)) {976                  const error = Cause.squash(exit.cause)977                  log.error("failed to read directory", { error })978                  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)979                  yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, {980                    sessionID: input.sessionID,981                    error: new NamedError.Unknown({ message }).toObject(),982                  })983                  return [984                    ...(referenceContext985                      ? [{ ...referenceContext, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID }]986                      : []),987                    {988                      messageID: info.id,989                      sessionID: input.sessionID,990                      type: "text",991                      synthetic: true,992                      text: `Read tool failed to read ${filepath} with the following error: ${message}`,993                    },994                  ]995                }996                return [997                  ...(referenceContext998                    ? [{ ...referenceContext, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID }]999                    : []),1000                  {1001                    messageID: info.id,1002                    sessionID: input.sessionID,1003                    type: "text",1004                    synthetic: true,1005                    text: `Called the Read tool with the following input: ${JSON.stringify(args)}`,1006                  },1007                  {1008                    messageID: info.id,1009                    sessionID: input.sessionID,1010                    type: "text",1011                    synthetic: true,1012                    text: exit.value.output,1013                  },1014                  { ...part, mime, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID },1015                ]1016              }10171018              return [1019                ...(referenceContext ? [{ ...referenceContext, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID }] : []),1020                {1021                  messageID: info.id,1022                  sessionID: input.sessionID,1023                  type: "text",1024                  synthetic: true,1025                  text: `Called the Read tool with the following input: {"filePath":"${filepath}"}`,1026                },1027                {1028                  id: part.id,1029                  messageID: info.id,1030                  sessionID: input.sessionID,1031                  type: "file",1032                  url:1033                    `data:${mime};base64,` +1034                    Buffer.from(yield* fsys.readFile(filepath).pipe(Effect.catch(Effect.die))).toString("base64"),1035                  mime,1036                  filename: part.filename!,1037                  source: part.source,1038                },1039              ]1040            }1041          }1042        }10431044        if (part.type === "agent") {1045          const perm = Permission.evaluate("task", part.name, ag.permission)1046          const hint = perm.action === "deny" ? " . Invoked by user; guaranteed to exist." : ""1047          return [1048            { ...part, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID },1049            {1050              messageID: info.id,1051              sessionID: input.sessionID,1052              type: "text",1053              synthetic: true,1054              text:1055                " Use the above message and context to generate a prompt and call the task tool with subagent: " +1056                part.name +1057                hint,1058            },1059          ]1060        }10611062        return [{ ...part, messageID: info.id, sessionID: input.sessionID }]1063      })10641065      const resolvedParts = yield* Effect.forEach(input.parts, resolvePart, { concurrency: "unbounded" }).pipe(1066        Effect.map((x) => x.flat().map(assign)),1067      )10681069      yield* plugin.trigger(1070        "chat.message",1071        {1072          sessionID: input.sessionID,1073          agent: input.agent,1074          model: input.model,1075          messageID: input.messageID,1076          variant: input.variant,1077        },1078        { message: info, parts: resolvedParts },1079      )10801081      const parts = yield* Effect.forEach(resolvedParts, (part) =>1082        part.type === "file" && part.mime.startsWith("image/")1083          ? image.normalize(part).pipe(1084              Effect.catchIf(1085                (error) => error instanceof Image.ResizerUnavailableError,
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1208：写入 message/parts 并发布 prompt event。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1208 
1116      yield* sessions.updateMessage(info)1117      for (const part of parts) yield* sessions.updatePart(part)1118      const nextPrompt = parts.reduce(1119        (result, part) => {1120          if (part.type === "text") {1121            if (part.synthetic) result.synthetic.push(part.text)1122            else result.text.push(part.text)1123            const reference = referencePromptMetadata(part.metadata?.reference)1124            if (reference) {1125              result.references.push(1126                new ReferenceAttachment({1127                  name: reference.name,1128                  kind: reference.kind,1129                  uri: reference.path ? pathToFileURL(reference.path).href : undefined,1130                  repository: reference.repository,1131                  branch: reference.branch,1132                  target: reference.target,1133                  targetUri: reference.targetPath ? pathToFileURL(reference.targetPath).href : undefined,1134                  problem: reference.problem,1135                  source: new Source({1136                    start: reference.source.start,1137                    end: reference.source.end,1138                    text: reference.source.value,1139                  }),1140                }),1141              )1142            }1143          }1144          if (part.type === "file") {1145            result.files.push(1146              new FileAttachment({1147                uri: part.url,1148                mime: part.mime,1149                name: part.filename,1150                source: part.source1151                  ? new Source({1152                      start: part.source.text.start,1153                      end: part.source.text.end,1154                      text: part.source.text.value,1155                    })1156                  : undefined,1157              }),1158            )1159          }1160          if (part.type === "agent") {1161            result.agents.push(1162              new AgentAttachment({1163                name: part.name,1164                source: part.source1165                  ? new Source({1166                      start: part.source.start,1167                      end: part.source.end,1168                      text: part.source.value,1169                    })1170                  : undefined,1171              }),1172            )1173          }1174          return result1175        },1176        {1177          text: [] as string[],1178          files: [] as FileAttachment[],1179          agents: [] as AgentAttachment[],1180          references: [] as ReferenceAttachment[],1181          synthetic: [] as string[],1182        },1183      )1184      // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1185      if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1186        yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Prompted, {1187          sessionID: input.sessionID,1188          timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1189          prompt: {1190            text: nextPrompt.text.join("\n"),1191            files: nextPrompt.files,1192            agents: nextPrompt.agents,1193            references: nextPrompt.references,1194          },1195        })1196      }1197      for (const text of nextPrompt.synthetic) {1198        // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1199        if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1200          yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Synthetic, {1201            sessionID: input.sessionID,1202            timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1203            text,1204          })1205        }1206      }12071208      return { info, parts }
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230：设置 session 权限并启动 loop。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1230 
1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })1230    })

6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路

Section titled “6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路”

API payload 不是复制粘贴 DTO，而是从 SessionPrompt.PromptInput 去掉 sessionID 派生：

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:66 
66export const PromptPayload = Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(SessionPrompt.PromptInput.fields, ["sessionID"]))

这保证 API payload 和内部 prompt input 不容易漂移。

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 session API 声明

Section titled “7.1 session API 声明”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324 
312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),

Java 理解：这像 Spring Controller 方法签名 + OpenAPI 注解，只是 OpenCode 用 Effect HTTP API 和 Schema 描述。

7.2 handler 做边界转换

Section titled “7.2 handler 做边界转换”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts:279-292

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts:279-292 
279    const prompt = Effect.fn("SessionHttpApi.prompt")(function* (ctx: {280      params: { sessionID: SessionID }281      payload: typeof PromptPayload.Type282    }) {283      yield* requireSession(ctx.params.sessionID)284      const message = yield* promptSvc285        .prompt({286          ...ctx.payload,287          sessionID: ctx.params.sessionID,288        })289        .pipe(Effect.mapError(() => new HttpApiError.BadRequest({})))290      return HttpServerResponse.stream(Stream.make(JSON.stringify(message)).pipe(Stream.encodeText), {291        contentType: "application/json",292      })

handler 不自己解析 agent，也不自己调模型，只负责补上 path param 里的 sessionID 并调用 service。

7.3 Session schema

Section titled “7.3 Session schema”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts:208-228

packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts:208-228 
208export const Info = Schema.Struct({209  id: SessionID,210  slug: Schema.String,211  projectID: ProjectID,212  workspaceID: optionalOmitUndefined(WorkspaceID),213  directory: Schema.String,214  path: optionalOmitUndefined(Schema.String),215  parentID: optionalOmitUndefined(SessionID),216  summary: optionalOmitUndefined(Summary),217  cost: optionalOmitUndefined(Schema.Finite),218  tokens: optionalOmitUndefined(Tokens),219  share: optionalOmitUndefined(Share),220  title: Schema.String,221  agent: optionalOmitUndefined(Schema.String),222  model: optionalOmitUndefined(Model),223  version: Schema.String,224  time: Time,225  permission: optionalOmitUndefined(Permission.Ruleset),226  revert: optionalOmitUndefined(Revert),227}).annotate({ identifier: "Session" })228export type Info = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Info>>

Session 保存的是会话级状态：目录、标题、当前 agent/model、权限等。

7.4 User message schema

Section titled “7.4 User message schema”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:327-350

packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:327-350 
327export const User = Schema.Struct({328  ...messageBase,329  role: Schema.Literal("user"),330  time: Schema.Struct({331    created: NonNegativeInt,332  }),333  format: Schema.optional(Format),334  summary: Schema.optional(335    Schema.Struct({336      title: Schema.optional(Schema.String),337      body: Schema.optional(Schema.String),338      diffs: Schema.Array(Snapshot.FileDiff),339    }),340  ),341  agent: Schema.String,342  model: Schema.Struct({343    providerID: ProviderID,344    modelID: ModelID,345    variant: Schema.optional(Schema.String),346  }),347  system: Schema.optional(Schema.String),348  tools: Schema.optional(Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Boolean)),349}).annotate({ identifier: "UserMessage" })350export type User = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof User>>

注意 user message 不只是 text，它还携带 agent、model、tools override、format/system 等控制信息。

7.5 Part union

Section titled “7.5 Part union”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:352-365

packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:352-365 
352export const Part = Schema.Union([353  TextPart,354  SubtaskPart,355  ReasoningPart,356  FilePart,357  ToolPart,358  StepStartPart,359  StepFinishPart,360  SnapshotPart,361  PatchPart,362  AgentPart,363  RetryPart,364  CompactionPart,365]).annotate({ discriminator: "type", identifier: "Part" })

这就是 OpenCode 能统一表示文本、附件、工具、推理、快照、压缩任务的关键。

7.6 创建 user message

Section titled “7.6 创建 user message”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:689-731 
689    const createUserMessage = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.createUserMessage")(function* (input: PromptInput) {690      const agentName = input.agent691      const ag = agentName ? yield* agents.get(agentName) : yield* agents.defaultInfo()692      if (!ag) {693        const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)694        const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""695        const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${agentName}".${hint}` })696        yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID: input.sessionID, error: error.toObject() })697        throw error698      }699700      const current = Database.use((db) =>701        db702          .select({ agent: SessionTable.agent, model: SessionTable.model })703          .from(SessionTable)704          .where(eq(SessionTable.id, input.sessionID))705          .get(),706      )707      const model = input.model ?? ag.model ?? (yield* currentModel(input.sessionID))708      const same = ag.model && model.providerID === ag.model.providerID && model.modelID === ag.model.modelID709      const full =710        !input.variant && ag.variant && same711          ? yield* provider712              .getModel(model.providerID, model.modelID)713              .pipe(Effect.catchIf(Provider.ModelNotFoundError.isInstance, () => Effect.succeed(undefined)))714          : undefined715      const variant = input.variant ?? (ag.variant && full?.variants?.[ag.variant] ? ag.variant : undefined)716717      const info: MessageV2.User = {718        id: input.messageID ?? MessageID.ascending(),719        role: "user",720        sessionID: input.sessionID,721        time: { created: Date.now() },722        tools: input.tools,723        agent: ag.name,724        model: {725          providerID: model.providerID,726          modelID: model.modelID,727          variant,728        },729        system: input.system,730        format: input.format,731      }

Java 理解：这是一个 command handler 把 request DTO 转成 domain entity。

7.7 解析文件 part

Section titled “7.7 解析文件 part”

文件 part 的解析分多种来源：MCP resource、data URL、file URL、目录、图片等。关键路径之一是 file URL 文本文件会调用 read 工具：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:867-888

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:867-888 
867            case "file:": {868              log.info("file", { mime: part.mime })869              const filepath = fileURLToPath(part.url)870              const referenceContext = yield* referenceContextFromFilePart(part, filepath)871              const mime = (yield* fsys.isDir(filepath)) ? "application/x-directory" : part.mime872873              const { read } = yield* registry.named()874              const execRead = (args: Parameters<typeof read.execute>[0], extra?: Tool.Context["extra"]) => {875                const controller = new AbortController()876                return read877                  .execute(args, {878                    sessionID: input.sessionID,879                    abort: controller.signal,880                    agent: input.agent!,881                    messageID: info.id,882                    extra: { bypassCwdCheck: true, ...extra },883                    messages: [],884                    metadata: () => Effect.void,885                    ask: () => Effect.void,886                  })887                  .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => Effect.sync(() => controller.abort())))888              }

这说明用户通过 CLI --file 附加文件时，OpenCode 会在创建 user message 阶段把文件内容读进 synthetic text context。具体文件权限这里被 bypass，因为这是用户主动附加文件。这个判断来自 extra: { bypassCwdCheck: true } 和 ask: () => Effect.void，来源同上。

7.8 plugin hook 可改消息

Section titled “7.8 plugin hook 可改消息”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1069-1079

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1069-1079 
1069      yield* plugin.trigger(1070        "chat.message",1071        {1072          sessionID: input.sessionID,1073          agent: input.agent,1074          model: input.model,1075          messageID: input.messageID,1076          variant: input.variant,1077        },1078        { message: info, parts: resolvedParts },1079      )

这表示消息入库前有扩展点。Java 类比：类似 ApplicationEvent 或拦截器可以修改 request context。

7.9 写入 message 和 parts

Section titled “7.9 写入 message 和 parts”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1117

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1117 
1116      yield* sessions.updateMessage(info)1117      for (const part of parts) yield* sessions.updatePart(part)

这一步之后，agent loop 可以只依赖 session store，而不关心输入来自 CLI、API 还是 TUI。

7.10 发布 Prompted/Synthetic 事件

Section titled “7.10 发布 Prompted/Synthetic 事件”

nextPrompt 会把 text/file/agent/reference/synthetic 分组，并在 experimental event system 打开时发布事件。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1118-1206。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1118-1206 
1118      const nextPrompt = parts.reduce(1119        (result, part) => {1120          if (part.type === "text") {1121            if (part.synthetic) result.synthetic.push(part.text)1122            else result.text.push(part.text)1123            const reference = referencePromptMetadata(part.metadata?.reference)1124            if (reference) {1125              result.references.push(1126                new ReferenceAttachment({1127                  name: reference.name,1128                  kind: reference.kind,1129                  uri: reference.path ? pathToFileURL(reference.path).href : undefined,1130                  repository: reference.repository,1131                  branch: reference.branch,1132                  target: reference.target,1133                  targetUri: reference.targetPath ? pathToFileURL(reference.targetPath).href : undefined,1134                  problem: reference.problem,1135                  source: new Source({1136                    start: reference.source.start,1137                    end: reference.source.end,1138                    text: reference.source.value,1139                  }),1140                }),1141              )1142            }1143          }1144          if (part.type === "file") {1145            result.files.push(1146              new FileAttachment({1147                uri: part.url,1148                mime: part.mime,1149                name: part.filename,1150                source: part.source1151                  ? new Source({1152                      start: part.source.text.start,1153                      end: part.source.text.end,1154                      text: part.source.text.value,1155                    })1156                  : undefined,1157              }),1158            )1159          }1160          if (part.type === "agent") {1161            result.agents.push(1162              new AgentAttachment({1163                name: part.name,1164                source: part.source1165                  ? new Source({1166                      start: part.source.start,1167                      end: part.source.end,1168                      text: part.source.value,1169                    })1170                  : undefined,1171              }),1172            )1173          }1174          return result1175        },1176        {1177          text: [] as string[],1178          files: [] as FileAttachment[],1179          agents: [] as AgentAttachment[],1180          references: [] as ReferenceAttachment[],1181          synthetic: [] as string[],1182        },1183      )1184      // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1185      if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1186        yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Prompted, {1187          sessionID: input.sessionID,1188          timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1189          prompt: {1190            text: nextPrompt.text.join("\n"),1191            files: nextPrompt.files,1192            agents: nextPrompt.agents,1193            references: nextPrompt.references,1194          },1195        })1196      }1197      for (const text of nextPrompt.synthetic) {1198        // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.1199        if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {1200          yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Synthetic, {1201            sessionID: input.sessionID,1202            timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(info.time.created),1203            text,1204          })1205        }1206      }

7.11 prompt 启动 loop

Section titled “7.11 prompt 启动 loop”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1228-1229

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1228-1229 
1228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })

用户输入与会话模块的终点，就是把新事实交给 agent 核心循环。

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”
  • Schema.Struct(Struct.omit(...))：从内部 schema 派生 API payload。来源：groups/session.ts:66-68。
  • object spread：{ ...ctx.payload, sessionID: ctx.params.sessionID }。来源：handlers/session.ts:284-288。
  • optional field：variant: Schema.optional(Schema.String)。来源：message-v2.ts:342-346。
  • discriminated union：Part 以 type 为 discriminator。来源：message-v2.ts:352-365。
  • generic/context service：export class Service extends Context.Service<Service, Interface>()(...)。来源：prompt.ts:94。
  • Effect.forEach(..., { concurrency: "unbounded" })：并发解析 parts。来源：prompt.ts:1065-1067。
  • non-null assertion：agent: input.agent!，源码在 file part read context 中使用。来源：prompt.ts:878-882。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  • DTO 派生：API payload 从 service input schema 派生，减少类型漂移。
  • Aggregate：session 是聚合根，message/part 是子状态。
  • Event Sourcing 味道：message parts 和 events 共同驱动 UI/agent 继续工作。
  • Interceptor/Hook：plugin.trigger("chat.message")。
  • Adapter：HTTP handler 只把 API ctx 适配为 service input。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”
  • Tool：file part 解析时会直接调用 registry.named().read。来源：prompt.ts:873-888。
  • Provider：创建 user message 时根据 input/agent/current session 选择 model。来源：prompt.ts:700-715。
  • Session：sessions.updateMessage 和 sessions.updatePart 持久化输入事实。来源：prompt.ts:1116-1117。
  • 文件系统：file URL 会通过 fileURLToPath、fsys.isDir、fsys.readFile 等读取。来源：prompt.ts:867-1039。

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

先把 message/part 建模清楚，再写 agent loop。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

请回答：

  1. 为什么 user message 里要保存 agent/model？
  2. part union 解决了什么问题？
  3. 为什么 file attachment 会在创建 user message 时被 read tool 读取？

如果卡住，换句话说：session/message 层是在把“外部输入”变成“agent 可以反复读取的内部事实”。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 PromptPayload 的定义，解释为什么要 omit sessionID。
  2. 找到 User schema，列出 user message 的核心字段。
  3. 找到 Part union，数一数有几种 part。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 解释 createUserMessage 如何决定使用哪个 model。
  2. 解释 plugin.trigger("chat.message") 的扩展价值。
  3. 解释 synthetic text 和普通 user text 的区别。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

写一个 resolveParts(parts)：支持 text 和 file 两种 part，file part 读取本地文件并生成 synthetic text。

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”
  1. 从 groups/session.ts:312-324 追到 handlers/session.ts:279-290。
  2. 从 handlers/session.ts:284-288 追到 SessionPrompt.prompt。
  3. 从 createUserMessage 的 model 选择追到 currentModel。
  4. 从 part.type === "file" 追到 read.execute。
  5. 从 sessions.updatePart 追到消息如何被 event/API 读取。

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. 为什么 agent 项目要把 message 和 part 分开？
  2. 为什么 prompt API 的 success 类型是 MessageV2.WithParts？
  3. 如果用户上传目录，源码怎么处理？
  4. 如果插件想修改用户消息，扩展点在哪里？
  5. session permission 和 prompt input tools 有什么关系？

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

下一步读 “Agent 核心循环” 或 “Tool 调用系统”。如果你已经读完样章 03-agent-core-loop，建议直接进入 05-tool-calling，因为会话层保存的 parts 会在工具调用中继续变成 agent 的行动记录。
